context.summary: Turn your BBC micro:bit into a scrolling name badge with just a few instructions.
how_it_works: This project makes a great introduction to coding the micro:bit.
Youâll discover how easy it is to create sets of instructions, or algorithms, in code, which is a language a computer like a micro:bit can understand.
The program youâll create scrolls text across the screen to show your name.
It uses an infinite loop which keeps your name scrolling on the micro:bitâs LED display output until you unplug the micro:bit from its battery or USB lead.

Add a âshow iconâ block to show how youâre feeling or express your personality.
Design a way of wearing your micro:bit badge using thread, tape or Velcro. (Don't use safety pins as the metal could damage your micro:bit.)
